economic_ownership_map.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary Q1 2025/Q1 2026 royalty reports establish shipped tons, base/bonus outcomes, and the 2026 $71.70/ton bonus threshold; reserve life and full contractual base-tier table remain operator-controlled. Provisional $30/$35/$42 pending reproducible PV bridge. See MSB/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
economic_ownership_map.evidence: The prior AAA award was paid in full on 2024-10-04: $71.185 million, or approximately $5.43 per unit (MSB 8-K filed 2024-10-17). The September 2025 arbitration is disclosed in MSB's 2025-09-26 8-K and 2026 Form 10-K Item 3, but neither filing states a claim amount, schedule, probability, or collectibility. Base value is therefore explicitly zero; the $13 high case is an unapproved upside sensitivity only. See MSB/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Base assigns no value to the undisclosed arbitration. Only a separately evidenced incremental recovery beyond ordinary royalties may enter the high sensitivity; ordinary base and bonus royalties remain in the producing stream.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Dismissal, an adverse award, a settlement below the separately modeled incremental amount, or a remedy limited to royalties already accrued in the producing stream.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: The April 30, 2026 Form 10-Q reports an $18.341533 million unallocated reserve. The 2026 Form 10-K reports 13,120,010 units. Their quotient is $1.397982 per unit, displayed as $1.3980.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Source-locked net trust reserve divided by source-locked units; refresh after every filing.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Material contingent legal costs or other senior liabilities consume the unallocated reserve.

economic_ownership_map.label: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Finite claim and Cliffs/Northshore concentration confirmed in 10-K/8-K; no primary recoverable-tonnage or mine-life schedule. Provisional -$5/-$3/-$1 remains evidence-blocked. See evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Deduction for depletion, operator concentration, interruption, and terminal-value uncertainty.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.

top_value_drivers.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Base assigns no value to the undisclosed arbitration. Only a separately evidenced incremental recovery beyond ordinary royalties may enter the high sensitivity; ordinary base and bonus royalties remain in the producing stream.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Source-locked net trust reserve divided by source-locked units; refresh after every filing.

blockers: arbitration_and_bonus_option: material component is unpriced; a valid calculation proof is required
legal_option_record: Reconcile the primary legal record, outcomes, timing, collectibility, and ensure ordinary royalties are not counted twice.
producing_royalty_stream: material component is unpriced; a valid calculation proof is required
royalty_reserve_reconciliation: Reconcile trust units, contractual royalty tiers, reserves, production, realized pellet prices, bonuses, taxes, and depletion.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Dismissal, an adverse award, a settlement below the separately modeled incremental amount, or a remedy limited to royalties already accrued in the producing stream.
Material contingent legal costs or other senior liabilities consume the unallocated reserve.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_log.author: valuation-contract-v2 migration
change_log.reason: Retire unsupported analyst ranges and make calculation lineage authoritative.
changes: Producing royalty stream changed from provisional $30/$35/$42 to unpriced pending a reserve and royalty distribution schedule.
Standalone concentration reserve changed from additive -$5/-$3/-$1 to an embedded risk control so depletion and downtime cannot be counted twice.
Current arbitration changed from $0/$0/$13 to unpriced; the historical award remains context, not a current payoff estimate.
Trust reserve changed from $1/$2/$3 to calculated $18.341533m / 13.12001m units.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Finite royalty reserves, depletion, commodity exposure, and distributions.
